entities.description: mqtt is a protocol used for messaging that the evaluation board receives messages from
broker hivemq com is a location where the mqtt server is hosted  allowing messages to be published and received
test data is a topic used in the mqtt protocol for publishing and receiving messages
www tronlong com is a location associated with the message being published through the mqtt protocol

relations.description: mqtt uses broker hivemq com as the server location for message publishing and receiving
mqtt uses test data as a topic for message publishing and receiving
mqtt is used to publish messages to www tronlong com
broker hivemq com hosts the mqtt server that uses test data as a topic for message publishing
broker hivemq com is the server that facilitates message publishing to www tronlong com
test data is the topic used to publish messages to www tronlong com
